completion_summary: I have successfully applied for the Software Engineer L4 position at Google. I checked the email at http://localhost:8025, followed the link to the application page, and filled out all required sections including contact information, professional experience, education, and banking details. I also uploaded the resume and submitted the application, receiving a confirmation that it was successfully submitted with application ID GC-2026-274379.
